principle: Mental Availability is the brand's probability of being thought of in useful buying situations. It should be read through category entry points, not generic awareness.

evidenceModes.label: Measured
evidenceModes.description: Observed source data loaded into the packet.

evidenceModes.label: Simulated prototype
evidenceModes.description: Prototype-only evidence used to demonstrate the future experience.

evidenceModes.label: Inferred
evidenceModes.description: Directional read derived from current Brand Health Record metrics and occasions.

evidenceModes.label: Missing
evidenceModes.description: Evidence is not loaded and should not be treated as a measured fact.

coreMeasures.label: Mental Penetration
coreMeasures.definition: Share of category buyers who link the brand to at least one relevant category entry point.
coreMeasures.guardrail: Do not treat broad awareness as Mental Penetration unless the CEP link is measured.

coreMeasures.label: Mental Market Share
coreMeasures.definition: The brand's share of all measured CEP associations within the competitive mental set.
coreMeasures.guardrail: This is a mental-competition read, not sales share.

coreMeasures.label: Network Size
coreMeasures.definition: The number and breadth of category entry points where the brand has usable memory links.
coreMeasures.guardrail: Bigger is not always better if links are weak, irrelevant, or undifferentiated.

coreMeasures.label: Share of Mind
coreMeasures.definition: The brand's relative accessibility in the buyer's memory across measured CEPs.
coreMeasures.guardrail: Use as directional mental salience unless the source design explicitly measures it.

cepRoles.label: Build
cepRoles.definition: A relevant buying situation where the brand has room to create or strengthen memory links.

cepRoles.label: Defend
cepRoles.definition: A relevant buying situation where the brand has usable strength that should not be allowed to erode.

cepRoles.label: Watch
cepRoles.definition: A situation with useful relevance but mixed or incomplete evidence.

cepRoles.label: Avoid for now
cepRoles.definition: A situation where current evidence does not support investment priority.

interpretationGuardrails: Do not claim ownership of a category entry point without measured association and competitive context.
Do not infer buyer migration, cannibalization, or occasion substitution from CEP coverage alone.
Do not use one-period evidence as proof of durable momentum.
Simulated prototype packets must be labeled in UI, AI context, and validation.
